_comment: Per-emitter profile keyed on OmniSIG real-time class labels (core:label). All fields optional; missing fields cause the corresponding gate to abstain. Use null to explicitly disable a gate.

_fields.expected_cf: Center frequency the emitter should sit on (Hz). freq_band_gate rejects anything off by more than cf_tol_hz.
_fields.expected_bw: Signal bandwidth (Hz). freq_band_gate rejects anything off by more than bw_tol_hz.
_fields.min_duration_s: Shortest acceptable burst duration (s). duration_gate rejects shorter.
_fields.max_duration_s: Longest acceptable burst duration (s). duration_gate rejects longer.
_fields.min_snr_db: Per-emitter SNR floor. Overrides --min-snr-db on the CLI.
_fields.min_power_dbfs: Raw-IQ power floor (dBFS). power_gate rejects quieter bursts.

nafyre_n11_pro._note: Nafyre N11 Pro. Uses a proprietary 5.8 GHz C2 link (DL) and a 2.4 GHz ISM uplink (UL). CF/BW below reflect the DL channel; UL sits in the 2.4 GHz band so cf gate is disabled (null) to avoid false rejects when the capture is UL-dominant.

ruko_f11_mini._note: Ruko F11 Mini. 2.4 GHz ISM C2 link. CF gate disabled because the exact channel hops; BW gate catches gross imposters.

dji_mini_4k._note: DJI Mini 4K. OcuSync 2.0 operates on 2.4 GHz and 5.8 GHz. Both DL and UL are captured under this class label in real-time inference. CF gate disabled to accommodate both bands; BW gate retains ~20 MHz OcuSync channel check.

holystone_360s._note: Holystone 360s. 2.4 GHz ISM only; DL-only captures in the dataset (hs_360s_DL). CF gate disabled; BW gate checks for plausible ISM channel width.
